# MuleSoft NetSuite Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (12.0) of NetSuite Connector documentation.
> See [NetSuite Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/netsuite-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the NetSuite Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [NetSuite Connector 12.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/netsuite-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating NetSuite Connector to Version 12.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/netsuite-connector/latest/netsuite-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [NetSuite Connector 12.0 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/netsuite-connector/latest/netsuite-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [NetSuite Connector 12.0 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/netsuite-connector/latest/netsuite-examples.md)
- [NetSuite Connector 12.0 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/netsuite-connector/latest/netsuite-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure NetSuite Connector 12.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/netsuite-connector/latest/netsuite-studio-configure.md)
- [NetSuite Connector 12.0 Troubleshooting](https://docs.mulesoft.com/netsuite-connector/latest/netsuite-troubleshooting.md)
